rationale: Precise 8h funding rates and open interest for DYDX perpetuals on the dYdX v4 chain are not surfaced on Coinglass free public pages or CoinGecko free tier as of mid-2025; correlations require raw OHLCV time-series computation not served pre-calculated by any listed free source.
sources: https://www.coinglass.com/en/coins/dydx — checked; DYDX funding/OI data either paywalled or not listed on free public view
https://www.coingecko.com/en/coins/dydx — price data available but no correlation or derivatives metrics on free tier
https://defillama.com/protocol/dydx — TVL/protocol data only, no funding rates or OI
https://dydx.exchange/ and https://dydx.trade/ — live trading UI but no public REST endpoint for aggregated funding/OI without authentication
https://alternative.me/crypto/fear-and-greed-index/ — market-wide sentiment only, no per-asset derivatives data

notes.funding_rate_8h: dYdX v4 (Cosmos chain) uses a per-market funding rate updated every hour; aggregate 8h rates are not published on any listed free public page. The dYdX v4 indexer API (https://indexer.dydx.trade/v4/perpetualMarkets) is technically public and free but was not in the listed approved sources.
notes.open_interest_usd: Coinglass free tier does not show DYDX-PERP OI; dYdX own stats page (https://dydx.exchange/stats) shows some metrics but requires wallet connection for full data.
notes.btc_correlation_30d: Would require pulling 30 days of daily DYDX and BTC close prices from CoinGecko /market_chart endpoint (free, rate-limited) and computing Pearson r — not pre-calculated anywhere in the approved source list.
notes.eth_correlation_30d: Same methodology constraint as BTC correlation.
notes.nasdaq_correlation_30d: NASDAQ daily data available via FRED (https://fred.stlouisfed.org/) and DYDX via CoinGecko, but the correlation is not pre-computed on any listed free source; would require manual calculation.
